theme_and_archetype.vibe: Premium SaaS + Student Product. Clean, modern, motivating, but not childish. Neutral main surfaces.

colors.accents: purple / blue tones (used strictly for main CTA buttons, small icon badges, and minor emphasis)

headings.rules: Remove unnecessary colored word highlights. Do not use overly loud marketing language.

card_style.shadow: shadow-sm or shadow-md (very light, premium feel)
card_style.spacing: p-6 or p-8 for clean breathing room
card_style.rules: Remove any solid bright colored card backgrounds. Cards should feel calm, neutral, and premium like the dashboard.

Hero.layout: Left: Strong heading + short description + CTAs. Right: Product preview/mockup or dashboard-inspired screen with small floating stat cards (daily tasks, active room, weekly plan).
Hero.rules: Must feel premium. No heavy glow, no neon, no heavy animation. Keep it clean and balanced. Avoid making it look exactly like the dashboard, but keep the lineage.

How_It_Works.name: Nasıl çalışır / 3 adım
How_It_Works.style: Simple vertical or horizontal list with numbers or clean icons. Neutral backgrounds.

Online_Study_Rooms.name: Online Çalışma Odaları
Online_Study_Rooms.structure: Left: Text description / Right: Preview (or vice versa).
Online_Study_Rooms.messaging: Emphasize 'yalnız değilsin' (you are not alone), coworking motivation, sync timer, live chat, and focused work.
Online_Study_Rooms.visuals: Can reuse room UI pieces if available or use the provided generated image. Must have a clear visual hierarchy and premium layout.

Feature_Grid.style: Dashboard card style (rounded-2xl, soft border, light shadow, neutral bg). Short and clear descriptions.
Feature_Grid.rules: Merge the old 'Solution' section into this grid. Do not use colored backgrounds.

Final_CTA.style: Controlled light gradient. Focused conversion section.

FAQ.style: Short, clean, accordion style at the very bottom.

sections_to_remove_or_reduce.Problem_Section: Remove completely or condense heavily into a single short text block before the features.
sections_to_remove_or_reduce.Solution_Section: Do not keep as a separate section. Integrate into the Feature Grid.
sections_to_remove_or_reduce.Comparison_Section: Remove the 'Geleneksel yöntem vs İzlek' comparison completely.
sections_to_remove_or_reduce.Duplicate_CTAs: Remove excessively repeating CTA blocks. Simplify to just Hero and Final CTA.

image_urls.description: Abstract Hero Dashboard Mockup showing daily tasks, a weekly plan, and an active study room timer. Use this in the Hero section right side if actual app screenshots are not available or as a supplementary floating asset.
Premium abstract UI illustration of a virtual online study room. Shows digital timer, live chat, focus mode. Use this in the 'Online Çalışma Odaları' section.

testing_attributes.rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='hero-start-button', data-testid='login-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: DO NOT redesign the app from scratch. Only refine the existing landing page in the given React frontend.
The project uses .js/.jsx files. DO NOT write or convert to .tsx or .ts. Keep it .js compatible.
DO NOT touch the FastAPI backend. DO NOT touch the Firebase auth.
DO NOT break existing routing or auth flows.
Review existing `/app` React frontend components and pages, especially landing page components.
Remove heavy color usage in background sections, switch to 'bg-white', 'bg-slate-50', 'dark:bg-slate-950', 'dark:bg-slate-900'.
Replace brightly colored cards with the defined dashboard card style (rounded-2xl, border-slate-200, shadow-sm, bg-white).
Remove redundant sections (Problem, Comparison, duplicate CTAs).
Integrate the generated images into the Hero and Study Rooms sections where appropriate if they enhance the premium feel.
Ensure the Turkish text is maintained and refined to be less 'shouty' and more premium.
Ensure the code changes are production-safe and minimal.
Do NOT add new heavy libraries or perform a major refactoring of the codebase outside the landing page UI.
Once the UI redesign is completed, tested, and verified, create a git commit containing all changes.
